$comment: Spike 5 single schema source. tool/generate.dart projects this catalog into lib/src/generated/registry.g.dart (typed Dart factories, via spike3's generateFromCatalog), lib/src/generated/tool_schema.g.json (LLM-facing JSON Schema, augmented with action affordances), and lib/src/generated/actions.g.dart (catalog-derived action affordance data used by the action router's hit-test). Edit THIS file, then re-run the generator. The per-type 'actions' map is a spike5 catalog extension: it declares which client actions a component type affords, so an LLM reading the tool schema can discover which components can be acted upon.

panel.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

label.description: A leaf component holding a single named string value. Cannot have children and affords no actions.

button.description: A pressable leaf control bound to an integer counter held in live client state. Cannot have children.

press.description: Increment this button's counter by context.amount (integer, optional, default 1).

set.description: Overwrite this button's counter with context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.
